title: pogostemon reticulatus
intro: Pogostemon reticulatus, also known as patchouli coil or patchouli, is a type of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pogostemon reticulatus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as a natural insect repellent. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oils, teas, and infusions, which are often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine practices.
